summary: Completed bug fix verification for Iteration 9. Both reported bugs are FIXED: 1) 'Failed to execute json on Response: body stream already read' error in image classification - resolved by reading response.text() first then JSON.parse(), 2) Market study not generating results for 'aceite de oliva España->Colombia' - now working correctly with full PESTEL analysis.

minor.issue: Occasional 502 errors during high load (transient infrastructure issue, passes on retry)

passed_tests: /api/image/analyze - Perfume image from Unsplash analyzed successfully
/api/market/study - Aceite de oliva España->Colombia generates full PESTEL study
/api/market/study - Smartphone China->Spain generates full PESTEL study
Frontend - Dashboard loads correctly with ImageClassifier component
Frontend - No 'body stream already read' errors in console
Frontend - Country selectors visible and working

body_stream_already_read_error.original_issue: Frontend was calling response.json() which failed, then trying to read response again causing 'body stream already read' error
body_stream_already_read_error.fix_applied: ImageClassifier.jsx and MarketStudyPanel.jsx now read response.text() first, then use JSON.parse() to parse the text manually
body_stream_already_read_error.test_result: 8/8 backend tests passed (including 3 image analysis tests with real images from Unsplash)

market_study_no_results.original_issue: Market study for 'aceite de oliva España->Colombia' was not generating any results
market_study_no_results.fix_applied: Same response.text() fix applied to MarketStudyPanel.jsx, plus backend timeout handling improved
market_study_no_results.test_result: Market study generates complete PESTEL analysis with executive_summary, 6 PESTEL factors, market_size, competitors, trends, opportunities, threats, and recommendations

success_rate.backend: 100% (8/8 tests passed on final run - 1 initial failure was transient 502)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (all components loading, no console errors, forms functional)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fixes for iteration 9 fully verified. Key changes: 1) ImageClassifier.jsx now uses response.text() + JSON.parse() instead of response.json() to avoid 'body stream already read' error, 2) compressImage() function added to reduce image size before upload, 3) MarketStudyPanel.jsx uses same response.text() pattern. Test images from Unsplash: perfume (photo-1541643600914-78b084683601), olive oil (photo-1474979266404-7eaacbcd87c5), phone (photo-1511707171634-5f897ff02aa9). Market study for aceite de oliva ES->CO generates complete PESTEL analysis.

rca_of_issues.body_stream_already_read: The error occurred because when response.json() failed (e.g., due to network issues or malformed JSON), the code tried to read response.clone().text() or response.text() again. In the Fetch API, once a Response body has been consumed (even partially by a failed json() call), it cannot be read again. The fix reads response.text() first which always succeeds, then parses the text with JSON.parse() which can be retried or handled with try/catch.
rca_of_issues.market_study_no_results: The market study was likely timing out or the response was being double-read. The same response.text() fix resolved this issue, along with increased timeout (180000ms) and AbortController for proper timeout handling.
